name: Toly Bread Co.,Ltd.
summary: Toly Bread Co., Ltd. engages in producing, processing, and marketing bakery products in China. It offers bread, cakes, and moon cakes. The company was formerly known as Shenyang Toly Bread Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toly Bread Co., Ltd. in March 2017. Toly Bread Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenyang, China.
